title: Bountiful Saplings
description: Bountiful Saplings Is A Vibrant Farming Expansion That Adds Over A Dozen Custom Fruit Trees, Upgradeable Tools, Nutrient-Rich Soils, And An Entire New Dimension – The Bountiful Tree Gardens – Has All Fruit Trees!!
body:
There arent pics cuz it didnt transfer well.
[My Discord Server](https://discord.gg/sbsdyXdNJC)
🍃 Bountiful Saplings

"Where every fruit bears a story, and every sapling starts a legacy."

Bountiful Saplings transforms the overworld and beyond with a lush selection of fruit-bearing trees, upgradeable orchard tools, custom soils, and an entire new dimension of fertility and flavor. Whether you're planting seeds, harvesting exotic fruit, or crafting tools imbued with nature’s energy — this is the definitive mod for players who want their world to grow with them.

🌳 Core Features
🍏 Fruits and Saplings + Apple Pie

🍎 Over a Dozen Fruit Trees

Grow Unique, Biome-Aware Fruit Trees With Different Shapes, Heights, and Wood Types (Vanilla Logs):

Red & Green Apples – Bigger, Newer and Better, Spawn in Forests (NOT IN PLAINS!)

Oranges – Medium Trees, Spawn in Savannas and Warm Zones

Tangerines – Short Trees, Savannas and Warm Zones

Apricots – Lightly Branched, Seasonal Feel. Spawn in Forests and Sparse Jungles

Mangoes – Tall Canopy Trees, Spawn in All Jungles

Lemons & Citrons – The Sour Cousins, Spawn in Savannas and Warm Zones, Lemons Only Spawn in the Bountiful Tree Gardens Since Lemons Don't Naturally Exist Lol (It's True Google It)

Avocados – Thick-Leaved, Deep Green, Spawn in All Jungles

Dragon Fruit – Exotic Treasure, Spawn in Beaches and Jungles

Olives – Dense-Leaved, Spawn in Savannas and Sparse Jungles

Coconuts – Throwables, Spawn in Beaches and Jungles

🌌Bountiful Gardens — A New Dimension

A Flourishing Pocket-Realm of Botanical Beauty.
Build a Golden Leaf Portal Frame and Activate It With a Gilded Fruity Stick to Enter This Vibrant Land.

Inside You'll Find:

All New Ores
Land Full of All Fruit Tree
Bountiful Grass and Dirt + Soilstone (Grass Has Chance to Randomly Bonemeal Plants on It)

The Gardens Are Peaceful, Lush, and Full of Exotic Resources.

🌿🛠️🌿 Upgradeable Farm Tools

Introducing Custom Hoes and Axes, Designed for Your Orchard Lifestyle. Tools Come in 4 Tiers With Growing Power, Durability, and Abilities:

Tier	Name	Description
0	Sprout	Crafted From Sprout Ingots and Wooden Rods!!
1	Verdant	Crafted From Verdant Gems and Iron Rods!!
2	Blossom	Crafted From Blossom Ingots and Gold Rods!!
3	Grove	Crafted From Grove Ingots and Diamond Rods!!



All Tools can reach up to Level 15. You have 4 Abilities

🌿🪓🌿 Tool Abilities
Ability	Hoe Ability Name	Hoe Description	Axe Ability Name	Axe Description


1

	Bone-meal 	R-Click to Bonemeal (Has Cooldown)	De-Strip	R-Click to De-strip Logs (Has Cooldown)
2	Sapling Fortune	Chance to drop more Saplings	Log Fortune	Chance to drop more Logs
3	Fruit Fortune	Chance to drop more Fruits	Haste Skill	Gives Haste after breaking a Log
4	Leave Break	Mines neighbouring Leaves (Radius depends on Tool Tier)	Log Break 	Mines neighbouring logs (Radius depends on Tool Tier)
🌿🏆🌿 Advancement Path

Navigate Your Growth Through a Full Custom Advancement Tree, Starting Small and Reaching Nature Godhood:

Everything’s Designed to Introduce Players Naturally and Intuitively to the Mod Systems

Enjoy The Mod and Suggest your Ideas!!
